_comment: Custom term lists for glossary detection. Terms are found in speech and added to glossary.json with [G:N] refs in transcript.md.

_categories.medical: NHS conditions, medications, procedures, clinical roles
_categories.legal: UK law, rights, regulatory bodies, complaint processes
_categories.custom: Anything else — with definitions you provide (used directly in glossary.json)

custom.definition: Personal Independence Payment — UK disability benefit replacing DLA for working-age adults. Assessed by Capita or Atos.
Employment and Support Allowance — UK benefit for people unable to work due to illness or disability.
Universal Credit — UK means-tested benefit replacing multiple legacy benefits.
Education, Health and Care Plan — legal document for children/young people with SEN in England.
NHS Continuing Healthcare — fully-funded NHS care package for adults with complex needs.
Deprivation of Liberty Safeguards — legal protection for people who lack capacity and are in care/hospital.
Eye Movement Desensitisation and Reprocessing — trauma-focused psychotherapy. NICE-recommended for PTSD.
Dialectical Behaviour Therapy — skills-based therapy, often used for BPD, emotional dysregulation.

_note: Lists under 'medical', 'legal', 'technical' are plain strings — matched in speech, added to glossary with a generic definition. Entries under 'custom' include your own definitions and are used verbatim in glossary.json.
